programme.desc: Zane, kidnapped by the Mechanic, faces Unagami while Pixal questions Milton Dyer for information on how to shut down Prime Empire.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Jay must stand alone against Unagami in the end-game, yet Unagami has a bigger battle in facing the truth about his own identity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Unagami breaks into the real world and terrorizes Ninjago City while Jay, Zane and Pixal attempt to prevent disaster by reuniting Unagami with Dyer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja are invited to attend the birthday party of Princess Vania in the Kingdom of Shintaro. They bring along Master Wu who is feeling his age.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Princess Vania reveals a secret entrance that leads to an underground mine beneath Shintaro where the city's dark secrets are held.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja attempt to rescue Cole, but the bickering of his fellow prisoners alerts the Skull Sorcerer, and soon the ninja are prisoners too.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: In order to escape the Skull Sorcerer's chain-gang, the ninja must convince the Munce and Geckles to put aside their distrust and work together.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Jay, Nya and Lloyd are led into the Mines of Shintaro by Murt who brings them back to the Munce "Home-Cave". The Munce Queen takes a liking to Jay.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: A party of Geckles suspect Kai and Zane of being in league with the Skull Sorcerer and bring them to their leader who subjects them to a Trial-By-Mino

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Separated from the others, Cole must find his way to the surface to alert King Vangelis of the dangerous Skull Sorcerer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: An entire episode chronicles how Cole, Princess Vania and Master Wu fall down a seemingly endless tunnel, into the bowels of Shintaro Mountain.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cole, Wu and Princess Vania befriend a motley group of survivors, called the Lowly, and are told the story of how they too ended up at "Rock-Bottom."

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Having joined forces with the Lowly in their quest to defeat King Vangelis, Cole, Wu, and Vania have to find a way out of the bottom of the mountain.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Nya and Kai, who have become the leaders of the Munce and Geckles, try to unite the tribes and defeat their mutual enemy, the Skull Sorcerer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cole, Princess Vania, Wu & the Lowly arrive at a temple in Shintaro Mountain which was once a training ground for Earth Elementals incl. Cole's mother

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja, the Munce and the Geckles take refuge in the Geckle Strong-Cave about to confront the Skull Sorcerer and Grief-Bringer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cole, the Lowly, Princess Vania and Wu blast their way out of the mountain to confront the evil Skull Sorcerer!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cole and the Upply arrive to rescue Lloyd and the ninja. To do so, Cole will need to retrieve his mother's fabled swords, the Blades of Deliverance.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The battle for the fate of Shintaro Mountain concludes!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: An expedition led by Misako, Master Wu and Clutch Powers goes missing while exploring an uncharted island and the ninja must pick up their trail...

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Having survived their journey to the island, the ninja venture inland, where they unexpectedly befriend a dragon and are ambushed by living statues!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: The ninja find themselves captured by the 'Keepers of the Amulet', who seem to be treating Jay particularly well. Meanwhile, Lloyd stages a rescue.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: As Jay is sacrificed to the sea serpent that terrorizes the island, the other ninja begin to suspect events on the island are not all as they seem...

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: When Nya loses control of her elemental powers, the ninja must search for answers, which may lie with the former Master of Water – Nya's mother.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya's mother, Maya, arrives with advice on how to regain control of Nya's powers. Meanwhile, Zane and Pixal discover that something else may be behind the disturbances.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: The ninja embark on a mission to uncover the source of a mysterious power signal that is disrupting marine life and Nya's powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya and Maya discover the source of the energy pulse that has been disrupting Nya's powers and come face-to-face with a dangerous new villain.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya and her mother Maya attempt to escape from the evil Prince Kalmaar, who schemes to overthrow his father, the benevolent King Trimaar.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Prince Kalmaar deceives the Merlopians and turns the ninja into fugitives.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Aided by Benthomaar, the ninja fight their way through the palace to the Hydro Bounty and must escape Kalmaar's forces.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: The tragic tale of Benthomaar is revealed, a tale filled with treachery, betrayal, but also with a glimmer of hope.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya and the ninja race to obtain the Storm Amulet before Prince Kalmaar can get it and use it to awaken the doomsday serpent, Wojira.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: In NINJAGO City, Wu, Cole, Kai, Ray, and Misako must infiltrate the Explorer's Club and recover the Storm Amulet before King Kalmaar and his troops.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Prince Kalmaar attacks NINJAGO City to obtain the Storm Amulet, but he runs into an unexpected obstacle: a determined young papergirl.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya learns the history of the Storm Amulet. Meanwhile, Wu, Kai, Cole, Ray, and Misako try to prevent King Kalmaar from escaping the city with the Storm Amulet.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Kalmaar awakens Wojira and sets his sights on the destruction of NINJAGO City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: The ninja do all they can to evacuate the city as King Kalmaar's assault on the surface world of Ninjago begins.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: The ninja suffer a defeat at the hands of Wojira, and Nya contemplates a decision that may save her friends and her city... but could spell her own doom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya leads the ninja against Kalmaar and Wojira in the final battle to save Ninjago City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: A year after Nya's sacrifice, the Ninja reunite to investigate Vengestone smuggling and the appearance of a team of New Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: After rescuing a drowning sailor, Nya meets a fellow water-elemental and comes up with a plan to regain her humanity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja investigate the Vengestone operation but end up fighting each other after a humiliating rescue by the New Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: When the Mayor refuses to release Aspheera from Kryptarium Prison, the Ninja go undercover to free the villain themselves.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja attempt an incognito highspeed heist to retrieve Aspheera's magical staff, but another run-in with the New Ninja exposes their secret.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja ward off the New Ninja to buy time while Aspheera returns Nya to human form, and a new villain plots trouble for NINJAGO.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja are imprisoned, and Lloyd receives a mysterious masked visitor with a cryptic warning from the Crystal King.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja run into an old enemy in prison and attempt to thwart his escape, while Nya finds new hope in an old mech.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Nya, as Samurai X, helps the Ninja escape, but NINJAGO's toughest marshal, Hounddog McBrag, is hot on their trail.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: A hopeful singer headed to NINJAGO City helps Kai, Zane and Dareth evade Hounddog McBrag, and Zane learns the value of emotions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja regroup at Twitchy's gas station and escape Hounddog McBrag's capture with a plan to infiltrate the Council of the Crystal King.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Lloyd travels in disguise to a hidden temple where he joins the Council of the Crystal King and learns Kabuki Mask's true identity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Harumi tells Lloyd how she survived and became the herald of the Crystal King. Lloyd learns her plan for NINJAGO but is powerless to stop her.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja search for Lloyd and walk right into Harumi's trap as Lloyd falls victim to her manipulation.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja search for escape while Master Wu and the others defend the Weapons of Spinjitzu from the Council of the Crystal King.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Nya, as Samurai X, rescues the Ninja, but Harumi's plan for the Weapons of Spinjitzu is already in motion.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Lloyd escapes from the Crystal Temple with the help of an unlikely ally, as both the Crystal King and the Ninja prepare for battle.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja retrieve the Destiny's Bounty and race to rescue Lloyd as he evades capture in the jungle below the Crystal Temple.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja fight back against the Crystal King's army as Lloyd and Master Wu trace a clue back to an unlikely ally.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An arson suspect, hoping to make a deal, feeds detectives false information that may lead to the release of a convicted rapist.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Curtis and Briscoe's investigation into the death of a horse leads to a killer who may target more than animals.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives link the murders of two male teens to a case that occurred five years earlier; McCoy fears he convicted the wrong man for the earlier murders.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A subway-station bombing prompts the squad to seek help from detectives in Baltimore where their prime suspect is wanted.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Paul Robinette returns as a defense attorney representing a crack-addicted black woman accused of kidnapping her son from his adoptive parents.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis' investigation of the murders of a mother and son leads to the father, but Kincaid uncovers the real killer.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigation of a gay man's murder leads the detectives to his former employer who sexually harassed him.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A shooting incident leads Briscoe and Curtis to a teen who had been given to a drug dealer to settle his mother's drug debts.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A father and daughter running a prostitution ring become prime suspects when Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a college student.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis (Jerry Orbach, Benjamin Bratt) investigate the poisoning of an infant in a wealthy neighborhood.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe, Curtis, McCoy and Kincaid witness an execution and try to come to terms with their roles in the killing of another human being.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and his new partner, D.A. Jamie Ross, handle a difficult case involving a carjacking and murder.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Watts Family Tragedy
programme.desc: A deeper look into the circumstances surrounding the Chris Watts murder case includes never-before-seen footage and new interviews with Tammy Lee, the agent with the Colorado Bureau of Investigation who elicited Watt's confession.

programme.title: A Baby at Any Cost
programme.desc: A surrogate grows too fond of the baby she carried for a young couple, so she does whatever it takes to get the child, the husband and the suburban life she so earnestly covets.

programme.title: Little Angel

programme.title: Little Angel
programme.desc: Join the Little Angel for a fun-filled bubble bath, where they make it believe that bathing is fun but with bubbles it is a fun bonanza.

programme.title: Little Angel
programme.desc: Join Little Angel for a delightful adventure and learn about their animal friends in this exciting escapade that is sure to bring smiles to young faces.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mr. Oleson seeks revenge on his wife after she refuses to pay a small ransom to his bumbling kidnappers.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles travels to Chicago to console his old friend Isaiah Edwards when the man's young son is killed in an accident.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A young boy named Elmer is teased at school; Nancy seems to get along with him, but she has ulterior motives.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mrs. Oleson converts her restaurant to "fast food," but her success causes problems.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The entire Ingalls family, trapped inside the house by a sudden snowstorm, spends Christmas Eve reminiscing about past Christmases.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: James accompanies his father on a long journey after learning that his new friend Gideon has run away from home.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura endangers her health and the life of her unborn child when she fights to keep a newly planted fruit orchard alive.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A modern couple buys a piece of antique furniture, unaware of Charles' pains to create it.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: An elderly relative of James and Cassandra arrives in Walnut Grove with the news that he plans to sue for their custody.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Hester Sue's estranged husband arrives in Walnut Grove and convinces Charles and Caroline to help him win her back.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura's joy over the imminent birth of her first child is shattered when Almanzo suffers a paralyzing stroke.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Almanzo refuses to exercise to regain the use of his legs until a storm levels his home; he realizes that Laura has given up hope too.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mr. Edwards almost alienates the Ingalls when he stays with them after alcoholism ruins his marriage.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Caroline faces an agonizing decision when she agrees to help a childhood friend whose illness threatens the life of her newborn baby.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles, Albert and Mr. Edwards follow the bank robbers who shot innocent bystander James.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney's excited to find out that Rusty's family is adopting a new baby girl from China; however, Rusty feels differently. He's not sure if he's going to be a good brother, and he doesn't know much about China.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Emma can't play with her friends because she has to complete a school project about her family. Before you know it, Barney brings Emma on a trip to Venice to learn more about her great granddad.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids are having a yard sale, getting rid of old toys, books and clothes. Kioko shows up holding a prized possession—a music box from Switzerland. By accident, Ben includes the music box in a cardboard box of yard sale items!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When the kids find a mysterious, colorful egg in the park, Barney takes them on a trip to Kenya to try to find out what kind of animal could have laid the egg.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's Earth Day, a great time for everyone to learn how to help take car of our world, but Ben is wasting paper while BJ isn't too concerned about cutting down a tree to make room for a new playground.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Kami, one of Barney's youngest friends, has trouble keeping up with the other kids and she's tired of always being last. She's not having a very good day.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Tony brings his kite to the park to show his friends, it accidentally blows into the branches of a tree! While waiting for a breeze to blow the kite down, Barney, Baby Bop and the kids play games about "up" and "down."

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are surprised to learn that playing games and having fun in the park is great exercise. Baby Bop is happy to learn that not only is she exercising while she plays, but exercise will make her grow big and strong.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Tony shares a box full of numbers that he made with his dad. He is showing them off when a gust of wind blows them all away. Barney and the kids decide to go on a number hunt. They soon find Baby Bop and their hunt takes the group all over the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's always fun to share a day with Barney—but it's also important to learn how to "play it safe!" Baby Bop, wanting to be a good helper, has been attaching adhesive strips to her frustrated (and uninjured) brother, BJ.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Beth has invented a brand-new holiday called "Happy Day," in which everyone gets to make a wish for something which will make them happy—and everyone else tries to make that wish come true! Barney and the kids discuss feelings and facial expressions.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Kurt Cobain: About A Son
programme.desc: In this visual essay style documentary, intimate audio of journalist Michael Azerrad's interviews with Kurt Cobain is played over more recently photographed footage of Cobain's Washington state homes and haunts.

programme.title: Liam Gallagher: As It Was
programme.desc: This documentary follows British singer Liam Gallagher as he attempts to make a solo comeback.

programme.title: Olivia Newton John: Behind Closed Doors

programme.title: Pussy Riot: A Punk Prayer

programme.title: The Beatles Explosion
programme.desc: See the early days of the Beatles with rare interviews, newsreels, press conferences, and television appearances.

programme.title: The Decline Of Western Civilization

programme.title: The Smiths: Under Review
programme.desc: Night Flight Presents: The Smiths - Under Review is a 90 minute documentary film covering the full story and music of The Smiths. It features rare musical performances; videos; TV appearances; and interviews with the band.

programme.title: The Story Of Bluegrass Music
programme.desc: With uncommon passion and devotion, High Lonesome traces the evolution of bluegrass, one of America's most vital musical fusions, from its folk roots in the Kentucky hills through the innovations which shaped its most modern forms.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Defensive fortifications span WWI bunkers to futuristic structures; explore submarine bunkers at Lorient housing 20 subs, Churchill's Cabinet War Room, Hitler's Berlin bunker, Cold War shelters, and nuclear weapon protection bunkers.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The history of photography beginning as early as the eleventh century; the advancements by Niepce and Daguerre in the 19th century and William Henry Fox and George Eastman in the 20th century.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: More than two million people die in the U.S. annually, creating 5,500 daily burials with 80 percent choosing caskets and 20 percent cremation; explore dealing with death throughout centuries and today's $20-billion funeral industry.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Some toys transform into valuable collectibles and become iconic classics; Adam sees how Play-Doh is created, visits the mecca of pinball manufacturing, learns how Slinkys keep springing back, and gets an inside look at Lionel trains.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Tiny weapons may not sound impressive, but small can kill, and it can also be easily concealed; from a pocket pistol used by the police to a submachine gun wielded by a bodyguard, many of today's most effective weapons are smaller than ever.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Experts design materials that can catch gunfire.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The biggest machines and their smallest counterparts; Airbus A380 and microjet; Boss Hoss 425-horsepower bike and 18-inch tall pocket bike; world's smallest production car.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the gang come face to face with Robin and her CP9 comrades. The rubberman is prepared to fight for his friend, but he’s never faced foes like this!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami are sent hurtling toward their deaths by the villains of CP9! Meanwhile, Usopp forges an unlikely friendship with Franky while waiting out a storm.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky tries to convince Usopp that there’s no hope for the Going Merry, but the sniper – inspired by a mysterious moment from the past – remains loyal to his beloved boat

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A look back at Franky’s past reveals the amazing origins of the sea train – and paints a vivid picture of his younger days, spent alongside Iceberg and the legendary shipwright Tom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky’s backstory continues! The sea train is a success, and it looks like Tom’s life is spared! Unfortunately, a government spy is searching for a reason to investigate Tom, and Franky provides the ammunition!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Tom does the unthinkable in an attempt to protect his apprentices, but young Franky is unable to control his rage, leading to a showdown with a spy – and a train!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper’s heroism may mean the difference between life and death for Iceberg and Paulie, Nami learns the agonizing truth about Robin, and Sanji prepares to make his move!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami makes a frantic dash for the Sea Train station, Chopper searches desperately for Zoro and Luffy, and Sanji plays it cool while waiting for the right time to spring into action.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami arrives at the train station a minute too late, Sanji makes his presence aboard the sea train known, and the search for Luffy and Zoro continues!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Robin risk their own lives in a desperate attempt to save Luffy and Zoro from a monstrous wall of water! Meanwhile, Sanji moves ever closer to a reunion with Robin.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Nami ask to borrow a ship so they can chase down the sea train, but the weather is too severe to set sail. Lucky for them, Iceberg and his friends are full of surprises!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Zoro, Chopper, and Nami rocket toward a rendezvous with the assassins of CP 9, but they’ll need to forge an alliance with some new friends to have any chance at survival!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Luffy go head-to-head with Mother Nature, and Sanji’s rescue mission is bolstered by Franky’s allegiance – and the arrival of the mysterious Sniper King!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sniper King, a mysterious warrior from the island of snipers, lends a hand as Franky and Sanji try to fight their way to Robin.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji mixes it up with a deranged cook, Franky dukes it out with the newest member of CP9, and the Sniper King gets creative in his attempt to reach Robin!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky and Sanji continue to battle the thugs of CP9. Meanwhile, Luffy and the rest of the gang find themselves headed for a collision that could spell doom for everyone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro faces a fellow master of the blade, Sanji looks to end his fight against a rampaging ramen master, and Franky finally lands a big blow against his CP9 foe!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Sniper King hatches a daring escape plan, but the assassins of CP9 are more powerful than our heroes ever imagined. Meanwhile, Luffy and the gang run into a very familiar frog!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As their train approaches Enies Lobby, Franky’s kind words cut through Robin’s cold exterior. Luffy’s train is thrown off course, but the group gains a powerful new ally!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats hatch a plan to rescue Robin, but as usual, Luffy can’t wait to find a fight. Will his impulsive attack derail their mission?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy manages to reach the main island, but the Franky Family’s assault is stopped short by a couple of angry giants!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes short work of a few hundred marines, the Franky Family takes down a giant, and the assassins of CP9 report back to Spandam!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro’s quick thinking – and a little help from a giant frog – sends the sea train soaring into the sky on a collision course with armed guards and their canine companions!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami electrocutes the enemy with a Clima Tact attack, but the bad guys have the Straw Hats surrounded until the Franky Family shows up with a couple of sea monsters!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Sanji, Nami, and Chopper try to catch up with their captain, Soge King is nowhere to be found, and Luffy runs head first into a battle with Blueno!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy shows off his new strength in a brawl with Blueno, Soge King befriends a giant, and a hulking sea beast makes the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy continues his battle with Blueno, Soge King’s giant companions make their presence felt, and the assassins of CP9 experiment with Devil Fruits!

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder
programme.desc: A tragic car accident on a canyon road becomes a murder investigation when detectives discover possible foul play.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder
programme.desc: An elderly real estate broker is attacked and left for dead in one of his listings; as detectives dig for clues, they uncover a business deal gone bad and a mastermind willing to use someone close to home to carry out a heinous plot.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder
programme.desc: A father is bludgeoned to death and his wife is assaulted after an assailant breaks into their family home; as detectives sort through the evidence, an unlikely relationship emerges involving a suspect who has held a deadly obsession for years.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder
programme.desc: When a young father is found shot in his bed, detectives quickly identify a suspect, but when the suspect is also found murdered, investigators uncover a lurid conspiracy involving betrayal and manipulation centered around an unlikely couple.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder

programme.title: Fringe

programme.title: Dirty Great Machines
programme.desc: Man's desire for natural resources is insatiable, whether it is to power our homes, fuel our cars or build our skyscrapers. But with reserves on land running dry, we are now looking to the oceans to satisfy the needs of 21st-century living.

programme.title: Dirty Great Machines

programme.title: Megastructures: Dubai

programme.title: Megastructures

programme.title: Megastructures

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash discovers a message in a bottle, which prompts our heroes to embark on a new journey on Sunburst Island and a quest for a highly elusive Onix!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes find themselves on Pinkan Island, home to numerous strangely colored Pokémon. Ash and Tracey are fascinated by these pink Pokémon…and so are the Team Rocket trio!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: After joining a scientific expedition to investigate a Kabuto fossil, Ash and their friends soon find themselves facing a series of natural disasters!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Another Water-type specialist challenges Misty to a battle and offers some advice: she thinks Misty's Psyduck might be ready to evolve!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a very busy Nurse Joy, who has to do some serious island-hopping to take care of all the Pokémon in the area! Can they help protect her from Team Rocket?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: In Ash's second challenge against the Orange Crew, he must climb a mountain, build a bobsled, and win a sled race! Do his Pokémon have what it takes to help him through these obstacles?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes' explorations take them to the seven Grapefruit Islands, where they learn that the islands' famous fruit has been disappearing! Ash, Misty, and Tracey set out to catch whoever's responsible.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When divers recover an ancient Orange League Championship trophy, our heroes head straight for the art museum where it's on display to check it out! Unfortunately, Team Rocket has beaten them to the punch…

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands: Meowth Rules!
programme.desc: When Team Rocket crashes on an island, Meowth is the center of attention when the locals mistake him for the 'Great Meowth of Bounty,' a powerful creature spoken of in prophecy. What will happen when they learn the truth?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands: Tracey Gets Bugged
programme.desc: Misty is not pleased when our heroes land on an island swarming with Bug-type Pokémon, though Ash and Tracey are having a blast. When they find an injured Scyther, can Misty overcome her disgust and help out?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands: A Way Off Day Off
programme.desc: When Ash and friends find a wonderful island brimming with many kinds of fruit trees, they decide to take a break and enjoy the bounty! Of course, Team Rocket has other ideas…

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands: Wherefore Art Thou, Pokémon?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands: Git Along, Little Pokémon
programme.desc: Slogging through a thunderstorm, our heroes notice a group of Magnemite soaking up electricity from the lightning bolts. When they finally get into town to rest, there's a blackout! Can the Magnemite help?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands: The Mystery Menace
programme.desc: In Trovitopolis City, Ash and friends hear stories about some kind of monster that's been scaring everyone—and when the ground cracks open and dumps them in the sewer, it seems they might meet this monster face to face!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands: Misty Meets Her Match

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands: Bound For Trouble

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands: Charizard Chills

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands: The Pokémon Water War
programme.desc: Our heroes’ plans are interrupted by a raging fire in a nearby warehouse. When they try to fight the flames, they quickly find themselves in need of the local fire department: Team Wartortle!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands: Pokémon Food Fight

programme.desc: When the head of the Klingon high council passes on, Picard finds himself in the middle of the struggle for the now-vacant position. Meanwhile, Worf re-unites with a past love, only to find he now has a son.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riker has to quit his birthday party during a so-far uneventful patrol voyage at the Neutral Zone to head an away team when a Romulan secret base is found on a planet which was believed uninhabited.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Before leaving for Starfleet Academy, Wesley Crusher accompanies Captain Picard on a dangerous mission.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As an unknown force drags the Enterprise, Deanna Troi struggles with the loss of her powers.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Data tries to comprehend the complex emotions between O'Brien and Keiko, who are about to be married.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being fired upon by a Cardassian vessel, Picard races against time to find out the facts behind the Cardassian commander's claim that the Federation attacked one of their outposts.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While answering a distress call, Picard finds himself not sure of exactly who he is dealing with, but he's sure he's NOT dealing with the planet's version of The Devil, as she claims to be.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Unable to come up with a logical motive for a shipboard murder, Tuvok performs a mind-meld with the perpetrator that brings out Tuvok's "killer instinct."

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Torres races against time to stop a deadly self-guided missile on a collision course with disaster.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A rebel Q escapes from incarceration and demands asylum on Voyager so he can commit suicide.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor falls in love with a Vidiian woman stricken by the deadly Phage.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix helps smoke out the crewmember who has been passing Federation secrets to the Kazon.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A space anomaly generates a duplicate Voyager and crew, but only one ship can survive an assault by Vidiian invaders.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: After crash-landing on a moon, Tuvok encounters three terrified children who claim they've been brought there to die.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Thanks to a complex sensory system controlled by a computer, Kim and others are literally held hostage by fear.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A bizarre occurrence during transport causes Tuvok and Neelix to fuse into one alien humanoid known as "Tuvix."

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: After contracting a deadly virus, Janeway and Chakotay are forced into exile on a planet that shields them from the effects of the fatal disease.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Using Chakotay's son as a pawn, Seska lures Voyager into an explosive showdown with the Kazon.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: While the crew fights for survival on a primitive planet, a lone crewmember battles the Kazon who have taken over the Voyager ship.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Tuvok experiences a repressed memory that's linked to his first Starfleet assignment under the command of the renowned Captain Sulu.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Convicted of a crime they didn't commit, Paris and Kim may spend the rest of their lives in a hellish prison.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A new Stargate team, lead by Dr. Elizabeth Weir (Torri Higginson) embarks on a dangerous mission to a distant galaxy, where they discover the mythical lost city of Atlantis -- and a deadly new enemy. Part 2 of 2.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay (David Hewlett) volunteers to be the first to try Beckett's (Paul McGillion) newest ATA gene therapy. But things go wrong when the device cannot be removed, and is stopping Dr. McKay from being able to eat or drink and endangering his life.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The Stargate team must rush to save Major John Sheppard (Joe Flanigan) after he becomes lodged in the Stargate, with only 38 minutes until the gate automatically disengages, and Sheppard is expelled into space, where he will surely asphyxiate.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After several attacks by the Wraiths, Dr. Elizabeth Weir contemplates if there is a spy among the team, with all signs pointing to Teyla. Feeling betrayed by the team's suspicions, the Athosians move to a newly discovered land.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard (Joe Flanigan), Dr. Weir (Torri Higginson), and the rest of the team visit a new planet, M7G-677, where no one is older than 24 thanks to a ritual suicide that the citizens believe is keeping the Wraith at bay.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: The Destiny is on a collision course with an ancient ship found floating in space. Panic turns to wonder as the ships dock with each other. The crew discovers that it might hold the key to a connection back to Earth and other hidden secrets.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: On Destiny, Chloe's behavior has become a cause of concern and a worried Scott makes a shocking discovery while searching her quarters: a journal with Alien script. He shows it to Young and Rush who decide they must keep a constant eye on Chloe.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: While exploring a new planet, Lt. Scott is attacked by an aggressive plant-like creature that infects him. Scott's circumstances turn dire and Tamara must search for a way to stop the alien infection from spreading while more creatures move in.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Col. Young (Louis Ferreira) is plagued by a recurring vision wherein Destiny is attacked and destroyed by aliens. After placing the crew on high alert, he starts to feel that he may be losing his mind and questions his ability as the commander!

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A newly formed galactic coalition extends an invitation to Lt. Col. John Sheppard and his team to represent Atlantis at their next meeting. But on arrival, the team is immediately detained and must stand trial for crimes against humanity.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Atlantis is suddenly plunged into darkness, with only the top tier of the central tower unaffected. As Sheppard and McKay attempt to get to the top level, they discover that a force field has been established to prevent them from gaining access.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: While Richard Woolsey (Robert Picardo) struggles to keep his position as the leader of Atlantis, and McKay (David Hewlett) and Zelenka (David Nykl) investigate a mysterious find, Sheppard is captured by an old enemy with plans to invade the city.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When the Atlantis team is given two weeks of vacation leave, Dr. Rodney McKay reluctantly accepts an invitation by his former rival, Malcolm Tunney, to attend a scientific demonstration that he claims will be the solution to global warming.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team prepares for the worst as board a Wraith hive ship over Atlantis. They're surprised to find the Wraith crew in stasis when a malfunction on the hive ship releases the remaining crew… who have been cannibalizing one another for food.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene makes a shocking discovery; Darrell multiplies his investment on a locker; Ivy tests his radar on the best.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The big guns come out in Riverside, but Rene isn't having any of it; Darrell presses his luck with a smaller locker and makes a neat profit; Dusty finds that once he gets going, it's hard to stop... so he just keeps reloading.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene and Casey plan to spare no expense in order to fill up their truck; Jarrod and Brandi's Long Beach store becomes the subject of gossip; Ivy's latest score could affect his career.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: With Capone in jail, Frank Nitti, Paul Ricca, and Joe Accardo take over. A Hollywood scandal presents Sam Giancana with a chance to prove himself.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Joe Accardo sets his sights on Las Vegas, but when Sam Giancana incurs the wrath of young attorney Robert F. Kennedy, The Outfit is threatened.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Joe Accardo and Sam Giancana have a falling out, and the fate of the Outfit rests on the outcome. Joe Accardo cleans up loose ends before retiring.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny and Bajie get help from an unlikely source, but it comes with a price. The Widow considers a risky gambit, while MK enacts a dangerous plan.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny confronts his inner demons while his friends struggle to help him. The Widow exacts revenge on her enemies with help from a new, deadly partner.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny and Bajie encounter an unexpected friend, but must also confront an unbeatable enemy from their past, while The Widow makes an unholy alliance.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny confronts his inner demons while his friends struggle to help him. The Widow exacts revenge on her enemies with help from a new, deadly partner.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny plays a dangerous game, causing his friends to question his loyalty. The Widow discovers the existence of a new weapon as her alliance falters.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode, Sunny relies on an unlikely person to help him defeat a common foe, while Bajie discovers a shocking secret from his past.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A strange illness begins to show itself while another more familiar one jeopardizes the expedition's most valuable resource - its captain's judgment.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: With the end of their provisions in sight, officers contemplate an 800-mile walkout while planning a party to raise the men's worsening spirits.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: As the men begin their long march south for rescue, a series of shocking events underscores how vulnerable and exposed their situation has become.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The death of an officer under mysterious circumstances creates paranoia among the men. Crozier discovers some of the crew may be considering mutiny.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Donna and Cameron explore their options to expand beyond chat. Gordon settles in at Mutiny. Joe launches his latest product.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: A packaging mix-up at the seed company results in Blueberry planting popcorn instead of daisies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum’s plan to direct a small, simple fairy tale play as a surprise performance for the Baby Berrykins snowballs out of control when she hears of the same play being done on a grand scale in a big city theater.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Strawberry finds herself in charge of the upcoming BerryFest parade, she hopes her gal pals can help her with the overwhelming amounts of chores. But each of them is rather demanding and ungracious, so they're no use at all.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry’s friend Coco Calypso lives on Seaberry Beach with her pet, Papaya Parrot, and a band of fun-loving monkeys.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Apple feels left out of a Berryball game and an advanced ballet class, she invents some 'groove booties' programmed to dance to any beat.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry’s cat Custard is shown to live a pampered, adored existence in Strawberry’s house. But Custard’s dream set-up is shattered by the sudden arrival of a rambunctious stray puppy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon creates super-duper musical neon manicures, Glamicures. At first the other girls love them, then, because they are so bright and noisy, they begin to dislike them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s that time of year when the berries are about to burst into bloom – and it looks like this will be a bumper crop!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much-needed vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While building a new Dog Park, Huck finds the Good Luck Charm that Cherry wrongly believes gives her the ability to sing difficult notes.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon orders a new high-tech machine to do salon services faster, then worries that she is no longer needed in the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum, determined to win a Dance-Off trophy, tries to get her friends and the Berrykins to dance just like a rival dance team, and learns that different people have different skills.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: At the girls' campout, Sour launches into a whopper of a yarn about the adventures she and Sweet had in the 'Berry Deep Dark Forest.'

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry has her hands full when she agrees to babysit a young Berrykin who has magical powers.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykin Bloom's braggart cousin, Berrykin Bertram, has won the hot sauce competition at the local county fair year after year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s winter and the pond’s frozen and that means Strawberry and friends can ice skate!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls decide to each bake Berrykin Bloom the perfect cupcake, to be presented at a ceremony honoring him for his achievements in Berryculture.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry have trouble collaborating on a decorating project, which causes all kinds of chaos... until they learn about teamwork.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The beginning of winter brings a brief spell of springlike weather, ruining everyone's hopes for winter fun. With help from Strawberry, the community adapts to the changing conditions.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When the girls discover that Apple's groove booties can teach the pups to dance, Plum gets an idea for a Doggie Dance Show.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends love to dance – and the Peculiar Purple Pieman of Porcupine Peak is taking advantage of that!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: As this year's BerryFest Princess, Strawberry must learn to be a leader, and overcome many obstacles, to make sure the festival is a success.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When the town needs a larger venue for their upcoming Glimmerberry Ball, Plum finds an ideal hollow tree for the occasion.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry spends all her time emulating her literary detective hero and ignores her friends, until Strawberry gives her a 'missing person case' to solve—the missing person being Blueberry herself!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Out gathering berries one day, Strawberry & her pets find a tiny fairy among the berry vines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Apple isn't paying attention when Strawberry describes their campout tradition of telling 'Tall Tales.'

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: On his way to Berry Big City to open a home for stray dogs, Huckleberry Pie’s Pet-Mobile gets stuck. He is rescued by Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One windy day, a tiny fairy named Sherry Bobbleberry gets blown into Strawberry’s open window.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Just as the girls are about to enjoy a vacation at their homemade resort, TV host Mavis Maraschino shows up to do a segment on Cherry Jam and disrupts their plans.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Friends from all over the world descend on Strawberryland to take part in the first Great Friendship Festival.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La pasión entre Ricardo y Patricia crece cada día. Verónica se presenta ante los Lobos como la nueva inversionista y le explica a Antonia que su exesposo árabe tenía minas en los Emiratos.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Constanza se reencuentra con su hijo cuando él va a visitar a Verónica. Antonia acepta la sociedad con Verónica. Aníbal enfrenta a su hijo, sabe que le ha declarado la guerra. El juez Villegas se molesta cuando Patricia le presenta a una sexóloga.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan, Óscar y Franco reconocen el cadáver de su hermana y acusan al hacendado como el asesino. Norma Elizondo se opone a las decisiones de su madre y desafía los deseos de su esposo Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes consiguen la dirección de la hacienda de los Elizondo y van a reclamar justicia. Gabriela se siente agobiada y toma vacaciones en su casa de la Florida, viaja con Norma y Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena y Sara Elizondo están cautivadas con los empleados que recibe Eva en la hacienda. Juan pelea con Franco por culpa de Rosario, la cantante del bar, y por oponerse a su venganza.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar propone una manera de desquitarse de los Elizondo sin mancharse las manos de sangre. Gabriela regresa sin avisar y entrevista a los trabajadores, Juan no puede ocultar su rabia y dolor.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Una fiesta termina en escándalo en una feria de revelaciones de los del Monte, cuando Pedro decide descubrir los secretos de la familia y los enredos de sus hermanos con Paula. Julieta escucha una conversación y decide marcharse de la hacienda.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta sorprende a Juan hablando con Paula sobre el momento de pasión que compartieron en la despedida de soltero, los celos que siente son tan fuertes que sale a toda prisa y cae por las escaleras. El incidente acarrea la terrible pérdida del bebé.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta sentencia a Juan al olvido y decide seguir adelante lejos de él. La ambición de Rosa no le permite apoyar a su hija, mientras Miguel le ofrece su completo respaldo. Paula sufre el rechazo por el resultado de sus juegos sensuales.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta amenaza a Paula y le declara una guerra frontal. Ella hace hasta lo imposible para vengar el dolor de un hijo perdido. Gustavo llega a la hacienda para iniciar el trámite de divorcio, pero José le insiste que debe reconciliar a la pareja.

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams conquer their fears in Zambia, Africa when they plunge more than 250 feet over the Zambezi River, feed a trio of crocodiles and walk with lions through the jungle.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Paris where Racers soar high above the French countryside and "drop mics" with a popular French rapper.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team risks falling to the back of the pack after taking a break to sight-see, and Racers take a big jump when faced with a Double Dutch Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams hit the town in Krakow, Poland with local street musicians to earn a hard day's pay.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With only six teams remaining, the competition heats up when Racers face a U-Turn, and some teams enjoy the sweet taste of victory after a candy making challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers face a third U-turn for the first time in the show's history, and teams try to power through an exhausting, late night detour on their way to an Indian wedding.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger…the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques…to trace… a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares…and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.
